scenario.key_phrase: Too expensive, let me think about it

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Hello! Namaste, this is Priya calling from PhysicsWallah. Am I speaking with Meera?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Yes, this is Meera. What's this about?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Hi Meera! I hope I'm not disturbing you. I'm calling regarding your interest in our courses. Can you tell me which class you're currently in?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Great! Class 10 is actually the perfect time to start preparing. Which exam are you targeting - JEE or NEET?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: JEE... but I'm not sure about all this yet.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Bilkul, it's natural to have doubts. JEE Advanced ya Main? And haan, since you're in Class 10, you have good time - almost 27 months for preparation. That's actually an advantage!

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: JEE Advanced. But these courses are probably very expensive, right?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: I understand budget is a concern, Meera. Let me suggest JEE Lakshya 2027 - it's our comprehensive program for ₹35,999. But here's the good news - we offer 0% EMI through PW Pay at just ₹3,499 per month. That's less than what most families spend on daily chai!

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: ₹35,999? That's still too expensive for us. I need to think about it.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: I completely understand, Meera. What if I tell you about JEE Arjuna 2027? It's ₹19,999 with EMI of just ₹1,999 per month. It covers all essential topics for JEE Advanced. Would this work better for your budget?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Maybe... but I can't decide right now. My parents aren't home.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: That's perfectly fine! But can I ask - do you generally have the freedom to make decisions about your studies, or do you always need to check with your parents first?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Usually I can decide about my studies... but this is a big amount.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: I understand completely, Meera. Tell you what - since you're serious about JEE Advanced and have good time to prepare, why don't you take today to think? I can call you tomorrow same time. Meanwhile, you can also check our free classes on the PW app. Theek hai?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Okay, that sounds better. Yes, call me tomorrow.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Perfect! I'll call you tomorrow at the same time. And Meera, remember - starting early in Class 10 gives you a huge advantage. Don't let this opportunity slip away. Have a great day!
